title: ai-agent-notifier audit pass record
description: One file per audit pass (docs/audits/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.json). Findings are evidence-backed and carry their resolution status so future passes can diff against them.

pass.description: Sequential audit pass number for this repo

auditor.description: Who/what ran the pass, e.g. 'Claude Fable 5 + 4 Opus discovery subagents'

scope.description: One sentence describing what was audited

knowledge_graph.description: Graphify snapshot used to guide the pass, if any

blocked.description: Verifications that could not run and exactly why (missing env/permission)

id.description: Stable ID: two-letter domain prefix + number (RT=runtime, CL=cli, TC=tests/ci, MD=meta/docs, SN=sentry/observability)

area.description: Kebab-case tag, e.g. error-visibility, naming, config-schema, test-honesty, ci-cost, npm-payload

evidence.description: file:line reference(s) plus exact quote or precise description at time of audit

status.description: fixed = changed in this pass; deferred = TODO left in code; wont_fix = rejected with reason; documented = knowledge captured, no code change needed

resolution.description: What was actually done (or why deferred/rejected), including new names for renames

verification.description: How the resolution was verified (command/test), or what verification is still needed for deferred items
